subcodes.title: Sabyr We Çydam Dilemek
subcodes.first_line:
## Sabyr We Çydam Dilemek

Eý Allanyň eziz kenizi! Bu pany dünýede ylahy synaglary görüp umydyňy ýitirme. Umytly bol. Je
subcodes.notes: Author: BH (Bahá'u'lláh). Prayer for a handmaiden -- 'O thou cherished handmaiden of God! Lose not the remembrance of God, be constant in praise and glorification of the Blessed Beauty.' Not found in inventory.
